title: Consultant needed for proper setup
excerpt:
Looking for someone to assist with proper setup of first phase of setting up marketing boards for a law firm. 
Must be located in the USA and have references.

posts.author: Legal007 (Howard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for someone to assist with proper setup of first phase of setting up marketing boards for a law firm.
Must be located in the USA and have references.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Legal007 and welcome to the monday.com community forums! The team at CarbonWeb is based in Cleveland, OH and would be well equipped to assist you with this project.

As a Channel Partner with monday.com, we spend our days working with users to solve their biggest problems when it comes to set up and workflow. Whether this is just getting monday off the ground for your business or a developing a complicated integration, we are here to help!

If you would like to schedule an initial consultation with me please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Legal007 ,

Howard, welcome to the community!

upstream can help. We’re Platinum and Preferred partners, recently bagging another Professional Services Partner of the Year award from monday.com.

Although based in Australia, we have a great many USA and internationally based clients and we are equipped with references, along with extensive experience and the most creative team you’ll meet.

We have our own full stack in-house custom dev team and can build/support for integrations as required. We’re always happy to accommodate the time difference where sensible and have a wide range of ways in which we can assist, including training and onboarding packages, rate-based consultation, individual support agreements, full professional services and custom dev works.

Why not arrange a meeting with me to discuss? At the very least I can give you some pointers on what to look for and things to avoid, ways in which you can help yourself when searching for a partner to work with and a benchmark for the quality of process and level of service you should expect to receive.

International Clients - Special Hours

I hope to speak with you soon, feel free to contact me directly if preferred.

Kind regards,

Peta Bolger
Services Consultant at upstream

email: peta@upstreamtech.io
phone: +61 3 9067 5611

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Legal007 ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

While we are not based in the USA, our clientele consists to a great extent of American and Canadian companies. I am sure we can also provide you with references from some of our previous clients, while you can also find testimonials on our website.

We have a wealth of experience in creating marketing solutions that are according to business and monday best practices, and have worked with numerous Marketing companies in the past.

We are also experts in both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your solution by integrating with any other software you might use.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you !

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com 1
